definition: Make an informed judgement about the value, quality, or significance of something, based on stated criteria.

expected_response.format: Judgement statement + supporting evidence from specific observations
do: Support with specific tasting or regional evidence

mark_expectation: Marks split between judgement (quality/readiness level) and supporting evidence
question_stem_examples: Assess the quality of the wine based on your tasting notes.
Assess the potential for ageing of this wine.
mentor_hint: Lead with your judgement ('This wine is of outstanding quality'), then immediately provide 3 or more specific observations that support it. Do not build up to the conclusion.
